fix: send end-alert messages even after bot restart (#16)

When the bot restarts mid-siren, activeShelters (in-memory) is empty so
handleEndAlert skips all groups. Added a fallback path that uses
getMatchingGroups() (Supabase-backed config) to find affected groups
when no in-memory shelter state exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 15: PWA & Performance - Offline support, caching, speed optimization

Service Worker Implementation:
- Full offline support with Service Worker (sw.js)
- Cache-first strategy for static assets (CSS, JS, fonts)
- Network-first strategy for API calls with fallback
- Automatic cache versioning and cleanup
- Hourly update checks with user notification

PWA Features:
- Web app manifest (manifest.json) for home screen install
- Support for iOS (15.1+) and Android (5.0+)
- App shortcuts: Calculateur, Programme
- Custom icons and theme colors
- Standalone mode (full screen app experience)
- Apple mobile web app support

Performance Optimizations:
- Font preconnection for faster loading
- Modular CSS/JS architecture
- Efficient DOM updates with vanilla JS
- localStorage for fast data access
- No external dependencies (lightweight)

Browser Support:
✓ Chrome 90+ (Desktop + Mobile)
✓ Firefox 88+
✓ Safari 14+ (iOS 15.1+)
✓ Edge 90+
✓ Samsung Internet 14+

Offline Capabilities:
- All features work offline (calculations, tracking, recipes)
- Data persists in localStorage
- API calls gracefully fail
- Update mechanism for new versions

Files Added:
- sw.js (Service Worker with caching strategies)
- manifest.json (PWA manifest with app metadata)
- PWA_GUIDE.md (Complete documentation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add interpreter-aware cmd_name for per-script aggregation

cmd_name() now detects interpreters (perl, python, sh, bash, awk, sed,
m4, java, cmake, php, etc.) and returns the script name instead of the
interpreter binary name. Handles -e/-c inline code flags, -I/-m etc.
argument-consuming flags, awk/sed -f script syntax, and env wrappers.

Add cmd_name_full() which resolves relative script paths to absolute
using the process cwd, used by the web viewer's group_by=cmd_name API
so that the same script invoked via different relative paths is not
counted separately.

feat: #54 forjar image --android — Magisk module generation

- service.sh with firstboot idempotency
- customize.sh installer with correct permissions

11 tests covering: ZIP structure, module.prop, init.rc, service.sh,
customize.sh, config embedding, binary stub, machine resolution.

(Refs PMAT-053)

commit.message:
fix: free stale model caches when input model changes

_merge_cache and _autotuner_cache hold references to patched model
clones. When switching to a different model (e.g. WAN High → Low),
the old cached model stayed in RAM because id(model) changed but
the cache was never cleared until the new merge completed.

Now detects model identity change at the start of optimize_merge and
auto_tune, clearing both caches immediately so the old model can be
garbage collected and evicted by ComfyUI.

commit.message:
Fix auto-refresh: read original files by path instead of stale copies

The previous approach saved a copy of each uploaded file to data/sources/
and re-embedded the copy on refresh. Since only the copy was saved (not the
original), edits made in Word were never detected.

New approach:
- User pastes the full file path (e.g. C:\Documents\report.docx)
- App reads and embeds directly from that path
- Stores {filename: original_path} in data/.paths.json
- Stores {original_path: last_mtime} in data/.mtime_index.json
- Auto-refresh checks mtime of each original file; re-embeds only if changed
- Refresh Now force re-embeds all files regardless of mtime

commit.message:
fix(skill): add anti-hallucination protocol, design intent filter, strict navigation — v1.2.0

Based on real 68-bug production audit that exposed 6 failure patterns:
- Add Phase 5.0: DOM existence verification before logging any bug
- Add context disambiguation (textContent capture) to prevent wrong-element measurement
- Add design intent filter: different categories/roles → different styles ≠ bug
- Strengthen dedup: systemic+page overlap, same-element-different-wording rules
- Expand Self-Review from 8 to 12 checkpoints (hallucination, context, design intent, nav)
- Enforce 3-level navigation: Page (route) → Section → Element "text"
- Add Gotchas #13 (same text different context) and #14 (intentional differentiation)
- Add 6 MUST DO rules (23 total) and 4 NEVER DO rules (12 total)

commit.message:
feat: update Rust scaffold to v12 — fix critical correctness and security issues

Critical fixes:
- DNA 3 validate(): remove op.action() after op.flattened() consumes op;
  action now destructured from FlatOp variant (correct HDI pattern)
- DNA 3 init(): remove notify_commitment_sealed from Unrestricted grants
  (write function, uses author grant via call(OtherRole))
- DNA 4 init(): remove check_and_create_harmony_record from Unrestricted
  grants (write function must not be callable by HTTP Gateway callers)

Design resolutions:
- Add CommitmentAnchor entry type + RequestToCommitment link to DNA 3;
  replaces broken get_agent_activity() private-action-counting approach
- Add PhaseMarker entry type + RequestToPhaseMarker link to DNA 3;
  DHT-persistent phase gate for offline-validator scenarios
- Fully implement notify_commitment_sealed() with CommitmentAnchor write
  + commitment count check + PhaseMarker(RevealOpen) on completion
- Add get_current_phase() coordinator function for DHT polling

Author checks:
- Add harmony_record_creator_key to DNA 4 DnaProperties
- DNA 4 validate(): enforce harmony_record_creator_key for HarmonyRecord,
  GovernanceDecision, and ReproducibilityBadge writes
- Add missing delete-block for HarmonyRecord; immutability guards for
  CommitmentAnchor and PhaseMarker

Minor corrections:
- Consolidate UndeclaredDeviation to shared types (was duplicated)
- DNA 1 EntryTypes: all entries marked visibility = "private" explicitly
- Add discipline field + discipline_tag() to ValidationAttestation and
  HarmonyRecord; shared discipline_tag() helper in shared types section
- ResearchHash: document real crates should use ExternalHash type
- Replace {":?"} format specifiers with {} on path strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ground AI in real departure data to prevent hallucinated schedules

Root cause: AI relied entirely on Gemini web search which returned
stale info claiming no Sunday buses exist. Three teams investigated
and agreed the AI was flying blind with zero access to the app's own
verified departure data.

Fixes:
- Inject live timetable summary into every AI prompt as ground truth
- System instruction now says departure data is authoritative and must
  not be contradicted by web search results
- Fix todayStr() to use UK timezone instead of UTC (prevents BST
  off-by-one starting March 29)
- Add expiration check on timetable cache retrieval (expired cache
  no longer served as if valid)

commit.message:
feat: Step 3 accordion UX redesign + Advanced Mode improvements (#180)

* feat: cache stitched results per combo + background pre-stitch all combinations

- Add Map<comboKey, blobUrl> cache so switching back to a previously stitched combo
  is instant (no re-stitch)
- On combo switch: if cached, restore URL + set view to stitched immediately
- On combo switch: if not cached, reset + auto-stitch as before
- After any stitch completes: background-queue pre-stitch all remaining uncached combos
  sequentially (respects FFmpeg WASM mutex)
- Show subtle "Pre-stitching combos… N/M" progress indicator under combo navigator
- All render/download logic uses effectiveStitchedUrl (hook url ?? cached url)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve all critical/high stitch cache bugs

- Fix stale comboKey closure: use stitchingForKey ref captured at stitch() call time instead of live comboKey in cache-write effect
- Fix race condition: set autoStitchTriggered.current = true in selection-change effect BEFORE reset() so auto-stitch effect sees it
- Auto-stitch effect now checks cache first — skips stitch if already cached
- Fix effectiveStitchedUrl priority: prefer displayedStitchedUrl (set synchronously on cache HIT) over stale stitchedUrl
- handleStitch cancels background pre-stitch, clears queue, revokes + deletes stale cache entry, sets stitchingForKey
- Pre-stitch loop checks cancelPreStitch and unmountedRef at each iteration
- Add unmount cleanup: revokes all blob URLs in stitchCache, sets unmountedRef

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: redesign Step 3 into sequential A/B/C accordion panels

- Panel A: product image selector + scene note → explicit "Generate Previews" button (no auto-fire)
- Panel B: video setup (quality, format, mode, seamless) with "Next: Script →" confirm
- Panel C: script panel — Easy/Advanced toggle moved here; advanced mode setup card with "Generate Scripts"
- Batch Mode (triple variant) renamed consistently throughout
- CTA style removed from Video Setup (was cluttering B panel)
- Brand Intelligence shown as compact collapsible row above accordions
- Info tooltips on Quality and Seamless mode options
- accordion completion status (CheckCircle2) displayed inline on collapsed headers
- openSection/bConfirmed state resets automatically when product or persona changes
- handleInitializeAdvancedSegments always generates pendingScript first to keep Generate Video enabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: multi-profile TRaSH Guides sync per instance

Each arr instance can now have multiple TRaSH quality profiles configured
independently. Sync, preview, overrides, and deprecation are all
profile-scoped. Formats outside a profile are never touched.

Key changes:
- DB: new trash_profile_configs table (UNIQUE per instance+profile);
  trash_user_overrides recreated with profile_slug in UNIQUE key;
  trash_sync_log + trash_pending_previews gain profile_slug column;
  migration copies existing profile_slug rows to trash_profile_configs
- Backend types: TrashProfileConfig, TrashProfileSyncStatus,
  TrashInstanceSummary; Changeset/SyncReport carry profileSlug
- Merge engine: profile-scoped upstream input; deprecation guards against
  allActiveUpstreamSlugs (all enabled profiles union) so cross-profile
  formats are not removed
- Sync executor: writes profile_slug to audit log
- Scheduler: derives interval from minimum across profile configs
- Routes: new /profile-configs CRUD endpoints; sync/preview/overrides/log
  all accept ?profile_slug query param; widget stats return profiles[]
- Frontend types/api/store: profile-keyed formats+preview maps,
  addProfileConfig / updateProfileConfig / deleteProfileConfig actions
- TrashPage: InstancePanel shows ProfileConfigRow list with per-profile
  Sync/Formats/Edit/Remove; ProfileConfigModal for add/edit;
  FormatsModal is profile-scoped; PreviewModal shows profile slug
- MediaPage: pass isAdmin prop to embedded TrashPage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: clear negative caches between runs, converge on stable API count

Rate-limited API failures were cached as negatives, preventing retries
and causing false convergence at 0 API calls. Now:
- Negative cache entries are cleared between loop iterations
- Convergence triggers when API call count is stable across 3 runs
  (not necessarily 0), reflecting genuinely missing data (~160)
